alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs at Google with two promotions, including end-to-end business process redesign and cross-functional delivery
alignments.job_requirement: Own the internal and external project roadmap across the full physical product lifecycle, from design and manufacturing through to customer delivery, driving prioritisation of deliverables

alignments.candidate_evidence: Advanced Excel and Google Sheets; builds Looker dashboards; proficient SQL for data shaping; experience translating metrics into senior leadership briefings
alignments.job_requirement: Build and maintain a programme steering dashboard that tracks KPIs spanning supply chain performance, engineering milestones and contractual commitments

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led cross-functional teams at scale; managed partnerships and external supplier relationships; experience translating complex technical and commercial interdependencies into structured delivery
alignments.job_requirement: Govern stakeholder interactions across internal engineering teams, supply chain partners, overseas manufacturers and military customers, ensuring decision-making is structured, traceable and aligned with contractual and strategic commitments

alignments.candidate_evidence: No direct evidence of headcount planning, recruitment, or program management function leadership
alignments.job_requirement: Coordinate headcount planning and recruitment needs in close partnership with Programme Management, establishing governance standards

alignments.candidate_evidence: No defence or military industry experience; no physical product program delivery at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Have delivered large-scale physical product programmes as a project or delivery lead within military or defence contexts

alignments.candidate_evidence: Professional/fluent English; native German speaker; clearance status unknown
alignments.job_requirement: Meet all requirements for national security clearance, fluent in English and German

gaps.gap: No defence, military, or government contract industry experience; candidate background is entirely commercial technology
gaps.mitigation: Would require substantial onboarding to defence procurement structures, military customer operating models, and national security contracting norms; unlikely to be accelerated

gaps.gap: No large-scale physical product programme delivery experience; candidate's background is software, services, and digital transformation
gaps.mitigation: Supply-chain coordination, manufacturing governance, and land-domain fielding are distinct from commercial operations; fundamentals may not transfer

gaps.gap: No PMP certification or demonstrated structured programme management methodologies (risk registers, roadmap governance, KPI frameworks) at scale
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has project-delivery experience but not certified or formally governed programme management; JD requires this as a must-have

gaps.gap: No headcount planning, recruitment, or programme management function leadership experience
gaps.mitigation: This is a secondary responsibility but indicates candidate has not built or scaled delivery teams

gaps.gap: No explicit experience translating complex technical and commercial interdependencies in a regulated, contractual, multi-national manufacturing context
gaps.mitigation: Candidate's experience is Google-internal or commercial SaaS; defence contracts have different risk, regulatory, and compliance frameworks

output.level_rationale: Senior Project Manager role requiring 6+ years of large-scale programme delivery in defence/military contexts with PMP certification or equivalent. Reports to company leadership. governs multi-stakeholder, high-stakes physical product delivery with budget, schedule, and contractual accountability. Estimated L5 based on 6-9 year experience anchor, cross-functional ownership scope, and senior stakeholder engagement. defence specificity and manufacturing-through-field expertise are material seniority signals within the domain.
output.summary: Candidate is a Strategy and Operations leader with strong cross-functional delivery and stakeholder governance experience at Google, but the role requires specific defence-industry and large-scale physical product programme delivery expertise that candidate does not have. Dashboard and metrics translation skills align, but absence of PMP certification, military/defence context, manufacturing domain, and programme management function leadership creates material gaps. Language and clearance readiness are secondary considerations against core disqualifications.
uncertainties: Candidate's security clearance eligibility not stated; German nationality may facilitate EU/NATO clearance but is not guaranteed
Scope of 'transformation programs' at Google unclear; may not translate to multi-vendor physical product manufacturing and fielding
No explicit evidence of budget ownership or contractual accountability in defence contracts or complex supply-chain programs
Helsing stage/size and reporting structure not specified; assumed L5-equivalent based on 'senior internal stakeholders' and defence contracting context
